positive: Minimalist botanical silhouette of intertwined laurel leaves and delicate eucalyptus branches, arranged in a harmonious, symmetrical vertical wreath pattern. High contrast, clean line art style, designed for apparel printing. Deep forest green and muted sage palette against a crisp white background. Focus on perfect negative space and clean edges. Studio shot, graphic design aesthetic, vector art quality, emblem style, symmetrical composition, centered placement.
